# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def create
    file = params[:file]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    # Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size
    result = `#{convert} #{file} -resize #{size} -format #{format}`

    # Send the converted image as a response to the client
    send_data(result, type: 'image/jpeg', disposition: 'inline')
  end
end
